name: EngramLite + Gated Skips + Full GPTQ + FA3
blurb: 11L 512d with EngramLite (multi-head bigram+trigram hash), sigmoid-gated skip connections, LeakyReLU(0.3)², Turbo-Muon (4 NS steps), coprime-stride loader, Full Hessian GPTQ int6+LZMA, XSA on all 11 layers, FA3 Hopper. 3-seed mean 1.1152 (std 0.0007).
author: icryo
